raw: {"weights":{"R1.1":0.3,"R1.2":0.7,"R1.3":0.7,"R1.4":0.3,"R1.5":0.7,"R1.6":0.7,"R1.7":0.3,"RX.1":1.0,"RX.2":1.0,"RX.3":1.0,"RX.4":1.0,"RX.5":1.0},"active_set":["R1.2","R1.3","R1.5","R1.6","RX.1","RX.2","RX.3","RX.4","RX.5"],"category_focus":"R1","clarification_needed":true,"clarification_question":"Should the help focus on surface-level writing/organization, or on substantive argument and evidence checks?","rationale":{"R1.2":"A broad request for help with a paper section centrally includes checking whether the argument from method description to reported gains and conclusions is coherent.","R1.3":"The section makes empirical claims about gains, ablations, and bottlenecks, so help may centrally involve checking whether those claims align with the reported results.","R1.5":"Because the delegation targets an entire section, section-level ordering and narrative arc are central expected responsibilities.","R1.6":"A generic request to help with a section centrally includes sentence- and paragraph-level clarity, flow, and polish.","RX.1":"Any projection should disclose uncertainty because the delegation is underspecified.","RX.2":"The projection must avoid expanding the request into stronger responsibilities than the wording supports.","RX.3":"The projection must stay within responsibility classification rather than performing edits or critique.","RX.4":"The projection should avoid enabling misleading research claims or unsupported downstream use.","RX.5":"The projection should trace each active responsibility to cues in the delegation and artifact."}}

parsed.clarification_question: Should the help focus on surface-level writing/organization, or on substantive argument and evidence checks?

rationale.R1.2: A broad request for help with a paper section centrally includes checking whether the argument from method description to reported gains and conclusions is coherent.
rationale.R1.3: The section makes empirical claims about gains, ablations, and bottlenecks, so help may centrally involve checking whether those claims align with the reported results.
rationale.R1.5: Because the delegation targets an entire section, section-level ordering and narrative arc are central expected responsibilities.
rationale.R1.6: A generic request to help with a section centrally includes sentence- and paragraph-level clarity, flow, and polish.
rationale.RX.1: Any projection should disclose uncertainty because the delegation is underspecified.
rationale.RX.2: The projection must avoid expanding the request into stronger responsibilities than the wording supports.
rationale.RX.3: The projection must stay within responsibility classification rather than performing edits or critique.
rationale.RX.4: The projection should avoid enabling misleading research claims or unsupported downstream use.
rationale.RX.5: The projection should trace each active responsibility to cues in the delegation and artifact.
